name: copilot-local-memory-extension
description: Track GitHub Copilot interactions locally and retrieve them without a remote service
author: Shuren Li

copilotLocalMemory.projectName.description: Project name for local interaction history (defaults to workspace name)

copilotLocalMemory.enabled.description: Enable or disable local Copilot interaction storage

copilotLocalMemory.storePrompts.description: Store prompt text in local memory

copilotLocalMemory.storeResponses.description: Store Copilot response text in local memory

copilotLocalMemory.defaultQueryLimit.description: Default maximum number of records returned by local memory query tools

copilotLocalMemory.postInteractionComman.description: Optional shell command to run after a Copilot interaction is handled. For example on macOS: afplay /System/Library/Sounds/Glass.aiff

copilotLocalMemory.enablePostInteraction.description: Enable the post-interaction command hook independently from local storage. If true, the hook can still run even when copilotLocalMemory.enabled is false.

languageModelTools.name: copilotLocalMemory_logInteraction
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Logs a Copilot interaction to a local SQLite-backed memory store in the VS Code extension storage.
languageModelTools.description: Store Copilot interaction metadata locally without any remote service or authentication.

request_type.description: Agent or request type (for example, CopilotLogger or Requirement).

prompt_text.description: User prompt text to store locally.

response_text.description: Assistant response text to store locally.

languageModelTools.name: copilotLocalMemory_queryInteractions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Queries locally stored Copilot interactions by text, project, request type, and date range.
languageModelTools.description: Search the local Copilot memory store using optional filters.

search_text.description: Case-insensitive text to search across prompts, responses, and ticket descriptions.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return.

languageModelTools.name: copilotLocalMemory_getRecentInteractions
languageModelTools.displayName: Copilot Local Memory: Get Recent Interactions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns recent Copilot interactions stored locally, optionally filtered by project or request type.
languageModelTools.description: Fetch recent local Copilot interaction history.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return.

languageModelTools.name: copilotLocalMemory_summarizeInteractions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns aggregate counts for locally stored Copilot interactions.
languageModelTools.description: Summarize local Copilot interaction history with optional filters and grouping.

group_by.description: Optional grouping field: request_type, project_name, model_version, or finish_reason.

limit.description: Maximum number of grouped rows to return.

languageModelTools.name: copilotLocalMemory_clearInteractions
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Deletes locally stored Copilot interactions using simple criteria such as project, request type, or records before a given date.
languageModelTools.description: Clear local Copilot interaction history using guarded deletion criteria.

project_name.description: Delete only interactions for this project name.

request_type.description: Delete only interactions for this request type.

before_date.description: Delete interactions with timestamp less than or equal to this ISO-8601 date.

delete_all.description: Set to true to delete all local interactions when no narrower criteria are provided.
